name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Long Beach, CA's Swift Title Loans at 2137 N Bellflower Blvd provides quick title loans for same-day cash.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates at 2137 N Bellflower Blvd in Long Beach, CA, a standalone location serving residents throughout the Long Beach area. The storefront is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM and Saturday from 10 AM to 5 PM, accommodating both early risers and working professionals. This Long Beach location has become a trusted resource for quick cash solutions when unexpected expenses arise.

At this Long Beach, CA location, the team assists with title loans using your vehicle as collateral, offering decisions often within the same business day. Call +1 562-566-3979 or visit the Bellflower Boulevard storefront to learn about available loan amounts, repayment options, and next steps.

Bring your vehicle title, valid ID, and proof of income to your appointment. Title loans provide faster cash than traditional banks, and this Long Beach, CA location's extended weekday hours make it accessible even if you work a standard schedule.
address: 2137 N Bellflower Blvd, Long Beach, CA 90815

company_info.headquarters: 2137 N Bellflower Blvd, Long Beach, CA 90815

pros: Same-day funding available for applications submitted by noon
Accepts applicants with bad credit and bankruptcy history
Loan amounts up to $50,000 available (above typical title loan limits)
Physical location in Memphis with extended hours including Saturday
Online application capability with 256-bit SSL/TLS security
Staff described as patient and willing to explain terms clearly
Competitive rates compared to other regional finance lenders per reviews
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee structure disclosed on website—borrowers cannot assess true cost
Car title loans are high-risk products with significant refinancing trap potential
Limited payment plan options per customer feedback
No mobile app for payment management despite customer demand
Reviews appear suspiciously uniform in tone and timing, raising authenticity concerns
best_for: Borrowers with damaged credit who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
People needing emergency cash within 24 hours and willing to pledge vehicle title
Individuals seeking larger emergency loans ($5,000+) beyond typical payday loan limits
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is suitable for borrowers in genuine emergency situations who have exhausted traditional lending options and own a vehicle outright. Critical caveat: title loans are extremely costly debt products with APR rates often exceeding 100% annually, and the website's complete lack of fee transparency makes it impossible to assess affordability before applying. Borrowers should explore payday alternatives, credit union PALs, or CDFI emergency loans before considering title-secured debt.
services: Application for borrowers with bad credit
Application for borrowers with past bankruptcies
meta_description: Long Beach, CA: Swift Title Loans at 2137 N Bellflower Blvd. Same-day title loans & quick cash advances. Hours: Mon-Fri 9AM-7PM, Sat 10AM-5PM.
